addressFull: Na Chom Thian / Bang Saray area, Sattahip, Chon Buri 20250 (Google plus code RWFH+8XJ8)

trainers.headTrainer: Kru Pat (identified in a recent visitor update)
trainers.credentials: A current visitor says Kru Pat has more than 30 years' experience; Klook describes former champions but names none.

pricing.singleSession: USD 15.55 shown for the selected Klook class

praise: Recent visitors describe technical, attentive instruction suitable for beginners.
Reviews emphasise traditional technique, fitness and self-defence rather than a tourist show.
